reviews.comment:
Bajé al servicompras y me encontré con 2 amables vendedores, quienes me indicaron como llegar a una playa llamada La Islita. De paso, compré unos súper sándwiches de migas, mortales!!!

(Translated by Google)
I went down to the shopping center and met two friendly salespeople, who gave me directions to a beach called La Islita. While I was there, I bought some amazing migas sandwiches, which were amazing!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5LXNfRlVBEAE

reviews.comment:
No aceptan previaje. Deberían aceptar, la nafta es parte del turismo.

(Translated by Google)
They don't accept pre-trip travel. They should; gasoline is part of tourism.
